Buttery & delicious! This is absolutely our new favorite
roll recipe. My husband in particular loves these rolls and
keeps asking me to make more. The recipe is super easy to
put together and makes a very high rising dough. Kind of
reminds me of a Sally Lunn bread - rich, buttery, and a
little sweet...

Row 25085Dinner Roll Recipes★★★★★
These were shut your mouth good! If I could have given them
6 stars I would have. I'm vegan so we did some substitutions
here. Soy milk, vegan butter, egg replacer (the flour kind)
and that's about it. The rolls were unbelievable toasted.
Make these and make them often.

Row 25087Dinner Roll Recipes★★★★★
